revision.comment: based off of [[Template:Friendly standard installation]]
revision.text: {{notice|image=Police man Twinkle Head.svg|This template is used by the standard installation of [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle]]. If you are planning to make major changes to this template or nominate it for deletion, as a courtesy, please notify Twinkle's user base and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]].}}<includeonly>[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: conditionalize categorization to basepage only, add a see also
revision.text: {{notice|image=Police man Twinkle Head.svg|This template is used by the standard installation of [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle]]. If you are planning to make major changes to this template or nominate it for deletion, as a courtesy, please notify Twinkle's user base and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]].}}<includeonly> {{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|<!-- let's not categorize /doc subpages --> [[Category:Templates used by Twinkle]] }}</includeonly><noinclude> ==See also== *{{tl|Friendly standard installation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: add {{{nocat}}} to suppress categorization e.g. for demos, some minor cleanup/formatting
/* See also */ Removing section, as the link is a redirect to this page now
move courtesy to end
Too much punctuation
use mbox so that |link= can be added to image
Adding [[Template:Documentation]] and moving <noinclude> content to the doc sub-page.
minor tweaks
revision.text:
{{ mbox | image = [[file:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | text = This template is used by the standard installation of [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle]]. If you are planning to make major changes to this template or nominate it for deletion, please notify Twinkle's user base and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy.
}}<includeonly>{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --></noinclude>

revision.comment: add optional param
revision.text:
{{ mbox | image = [[file:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | text = This template is used by the standard installation of [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle]]. If you are planning to make major changes to this template or nominate it for deletion, please notify Twinkle's user base and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy.{{#if:{{{1|}}}|

{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Protected Template:Twinkle standard installation: [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|Highly-visible template]] (TW) (‎[edit=autoconfirmed] (indefinite))
revision.text:
{{ mbox | image = [[file:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | text = This template is used by the standard installation of [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle]]. If you are planning to make major changes to this template or nominate it for deletion, please notify Twinkle's user base and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy.{{#if:{{{1|}}}|

{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:Twinkle standard installation: [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|Highly-visible template]] (‎[edit=autoconfirmed] (indefinite) ‎[move=sysop] (indefinite))
revision.text:
{{ mbox | image = [[file:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | text = This template is used by the standard installation of [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle]]. If you are planning to make major changes to this template or nominate it for deletion, please notify Twinkle's user base and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy.{{#if:{{{1|}}}|

{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: See talk page for summary and reason.
revision.text:
{{ mbox | image = [[file:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | text = If you plan to make major changes to the above template, or nominate it for deletion, please notify Twinkle's users/maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as this template is used by the standard installation of [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle]]. Thanks! {{#if:{{{1|}}}|

{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

{{ mbox | image = [[file:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | text = If you plan to make major changes to the above template, or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle's]] users/maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as this template is used by the standard installation of Twinkle. Thank you! {{#if:{{{1|}}}|

{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: also moving
revision.text:
{{ mbox | image = [[file:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | text = If you plan to make major changes to the above template, move it, or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle's]] users/maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as this template is used by the standard installation of Twinkle. Thank you! {{#if:{{{1|}}}|

{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: "this" template, to avoid head-scratching
revision.text:
{{ mbox | image = [[file:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | text = If you plan to make major changes to this template, move it, or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle's]] users/maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as this template is used by the standard installation of Twinkle. Thank you! {{#if:{{{1|}}}|

{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: /* top */ Spelling/grammar correction
revision.text:
{{ mbox | image = [[file:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | text = If you plan to make major changes to this template, move it, or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle's]] users/maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as this template is used in the standard installation of Twinkle. Thank you! {{#if:{{{1|}}}|

{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: notifying Twinkle matters if the change is breaking, even if it's not otherwise major, and being major on its own has nothing to do with it
revision.text:
{{ mbox | image = [[file:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | text = If you plan to make breaking changes to this template, move it, or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle's]] users/maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as this template is used in the standard installation of Twinkle. Thank you! {{#if:{{{1|}}}|

{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

{{ mbox | image = [[file:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | text = If you plan to make broken changes to this template, mow it, or nuke it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle's]] users/maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as this template is used in the standard installation of Twinkle. Thank you! {{#if:{{{1|}}}|

{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/The Bank Eater|The Bank Eater]] ([[User talk:The Bank Eater|talk]]) to last version by Jackmcbarn
revision.text:
{{ mbox | image = [[file:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | text = If you plan to make breaking changes to this template, move it, or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle's]] users/maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as this template is used in the standard installation of Twinkle. Thank you! {{#if:{{{1|}}}|

{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Avoid slashes in prose per [[MOS:SLASH]] (so let's set a good example of encyclopedic grammar here).
revision.text:
{{ mbox | image = [[file:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | text = If you plan to make breaking changes to this template, move it, or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle's]] users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as this template is used in the standard installation of Twinkle. Thank you! {{#if:{{{1|}}}|

{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Just because a person knows how to edit a template does not mean they will have any clue what "breaking changes" are - link added.
revision.text:
{{ mbox | image = [[file:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | text = If you plan to make [[backward compatibility|breaking changes]] to this template, move it, or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle's]] users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as this template is used in the standard installation of Twinkle. Thank you! {{#if:{{{1|}}}|

{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: br instead of p
revision.text:
{{ mbox | image = [[file:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | text = If you plan to make [[backward compatibility|breaking changes]] to this template, move it, or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle's]] users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as this template is used in the standard installation of Twinkle. Thank you! {{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

{{Mbox | image = [[File:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=Logo of Twinkle; Police Man|link=]] | text = If you plan to make [[backward compatibility|breaking changes]] to this template, move it, or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle's]] users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as this template is used in the standard installation of Twinkle. Thank you! {{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Backwards compatibility is not related to major changes
revision.text:
{{Mbox | image = [[File:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=Logo of Twinkle; Police Man|link=]] | text = If you plan to make breaking changes to this template, move it, or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle's]] users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as this template is used in the standard installation of Twinkle. Thank you! {{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: link to an explanation of "breaking changes"
revision.text:
{{Mbox | image = [[File:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=Logo of Twinkle; Police Man|link=]] | text = If you plan to make [[Template:Twinkle standard installation#"breaking changes"|breaking changes]] to this template, move it, or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle's]] users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as this template is used in the standard installation of Twinkle. Thank you! {{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: add transclusionless template category to keep these pages off of reports
revision.text:
{{Mbox | image = [[File:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=Logo of Twinkle; Police Man|link=]] | text = If you plan to make [[Template:Twinkle standard installation#"breaking changes"|breaking changes]] to this template, move it, or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle's]] users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as this template is used in the standard installation of Twinkle. Thank you! {{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]][[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Undid revision 1057119398 by [[Special:Contributions/Jonesey95|Jonesey95]] ([[User talk:Jonesey95|talk]]) this isn't production the correct result. It placed a template like [[Template:Baptismal name]] in that category, which if unused is a valid unuse
revision.text:
{{Mbox | image = [[File:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=Logo of Twinkle; Police Man|link=]] | text = If you plan to make [[Template:Twinkle standard installation#"breaking changes"|breaking changes]] to this template, move it, or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle's]] users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as this template is used in the standard installation of Twinkle. Thank you! {{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: added merge
revision.text:
{{Mbox | image = [[File:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=Logo of Twinkle; Police Man|link=]] | text = If you plan to make [[Template:Twinkle standard installation#"breaking changes"|breaking changes]] to this template, move it, merge it or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle's]] users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as this template is used in the standard installation of Twinkle. Thank you! {{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: oops you actually can't merge templates
revision.text:
{{Mbox | image = [[File:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=Logo of Twinkle; Police Man|link=]] | text = If you plan to make [[Template:Twinkle standard installation#"breaking changes"|breaking changes]] to this template, move it or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle's]] users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as this template is used in the standard installation of Twinkle. Thank you! {{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: rv to last stable version. No need to remove this comma.
revision.text:
{{Mbox | image = [[File:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=Logo of Twinkle; Police Man|link=]] | text = If you plan to make [[Template:Twinkle standard installation#"breaking changes"|breaking changes]] to this template, move it, or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle's]] users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as this template is used in the standard installation of Twinkle. Thank you! {{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: added minor method addition
revision.text:
{{Mbox | image = [[File:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=Logo of Twinkle; Police Man|link=]] | text = If you plan to make [[Template:Twinkle standard installation#"breaking changes"|breaking changes]] to this template, move it, change scope or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle's]] users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as this template is used in the standard installation of Twinkle. Thank you! {{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/Dawn PScLim|Dawn PScLim]] ([[User talk:Dawn PScLim|talk]]) to last version by Jonesey95
revision.text:
{{Mbox | image = [[File:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=Logo of Twinkle; Police Man|link=]] | text = If you plan to make [[Template:Twinkle standard installation#"breaking changes"|breaking changes]] to this template, move it, or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle's]] users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as this template is used in the standard installation of Twinkle. Thank you! {{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Twinkle adds and removes this template.
revision.text:
{{Mbox | image = [[File:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=Logo of Twinkle; Police Man|link=]] | text = If you plan to make [[Template:Twinkle standard installation#"breaking changes"|breaking changes]] to this template, move it, or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle's]] users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as the standard installation of Twinkle adds and removes this template. Thank you!{{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Moved apostrophe outside of the link
revision.text:
{{Mbox | image = [[File:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=Logo of Twinkle; Police Man|link=]] | text = If you plan to make [[Template:Twinkle standard installation#"breaking changes"|breaking changes]] to this template, move it, or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle]]'s users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as the standard installation of Twinkle adds and removes this template. Thank you!{{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Twinkle_standard_installation]]
revision.text:
{{Mbox | image = [[File:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=Logo of Twinkle; Police Man|link=]] | text = If you plan to make [[Template:Twinkle standard installation#"breaking changes"|breaking changes]] to this template, move it, or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle]]'s users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as the standard installation of Twinkle adds and removes this template. Thank you!{{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: adjust wording
revision.text:
{{Mbox | image = [[File:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=Logo of Twinkle; Police Man|link=]] | text = [[Template:Twinkle standard installation#"breaking changes"|Breaking changes]] to this template, such as moving it or nominating it for deletion, should be communicated to [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle]]'s users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy. The standard installation of Twinkle relies on this template. Thank you.{{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1265324744|1265324744]] by [[Special:Contributions/Waddie96|Waddie96]] ([[User talk:Waddie96|talk]]). I think this changes the intent of the notice. It is about communicating plans, not communicating after action has been taken
revision.text:
{{Mbox | image = [[File:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=Logo of Twinkle; Police Man|link=]] | text = If you plan to make [[Template:Twinkle standard installation#"breaking changes"|breaking changes]] to this template, move it, or nominate it for deletion, please notify [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle]]'s users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]] as a courtesy, as the standard installation of Twinkle adds and removes this template. Thank you!{{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: I don't mean to edit war, but [[User:Jonesey95|Jonesey95]] I've made it clear now that changes must be communicated in advance.
revision.text:
{{Mbox | image = [[File:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=Logo of Twinkle; Police Man|link=]] | text = Any [[Template:Twinkle standard installation#“breaking changes”|breaking changes]] to this template, such as moving it or nominating it for deletion, '''must be communicated in advance''' to [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle]]'s users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]]. The standard installation of Twinkle relies on this template. Thank you.{{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Please stop changing the meaning of the sentences
revision.text:
{{Mbox | image = [[File:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=Logo of Twinkle; Police Man|link=]] | text = Any [[Template:Twinkle standard installation#“breaking changes”|breaking changes]] to this template, including moving it or nominating it for deletion, '''must be communicated in advance''' to [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle]]'s users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]]. The standard installation of Twinkle relies on this template. Thank you.{{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: fix section link
revision.text:
{{Mbox | image = [[File:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=Logo of Twinkle; Police Man|link=]] | text = Any [[Template:Twinkle standard installation#"Breaking changes"|breaking changes]] to this template, including moving it or nominating it for deletion, '''must be communicated in advance''' to [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle]]'s users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]]. The standard installation of Twinkle relies on this template. Thank you.{{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

The standard installation of Twinkle relies on this template. Thank you.{{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Mbox | image = [[File:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=Logo of Twinkle; Police Man|link=]] | text = Any [[Template:Twinkle standard installation#"Breaking changes"|breaking changes]] to this template, including moving it or nominating it for deletion, '''must be communicated in advance''' to [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle]]'s users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]]. The standard installation of Twinkle relies on this template. Thank you.{{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] }}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Mbox | image = [[File:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=Logo of Twinkle; Police Man|link=]] | text = Any [[Template:Twinkle standard installation#"Breaking changes"|breaking changes]] to this template, including moving it or nominating it for deletion, '''must be communicated in advance''' to [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle]]'s users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]]. The standard installation of Twinkle relies on this template. Thank you.{{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] }}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: fix linking
revision.text:
{{Mbox | image = [[File:Police man Twinkle Head.svg|50x40px|alt=Logo of Twinkle; Police Man|link=]] | text = Any [[Template:Twinkle standard installation/doc#"Breaking changes"|breaking changes]] to this template, including moving it or nominating it for deletion, '''must be communicated in advance''' to [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle]]'s users and maintainers at [[Wikipedia talk:Twinkle]]. The standard installation of Twinkle relies on this template. Thank you.{{#if:{{{1|}}}|
{{{1}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:Templates used by Twinkle|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}} {{Documentation}}
